title: Make the PERFECT Videos with Claude Code (Full Workflow)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates an automated video production pipeline that uses Claude Code to handle planning, scripting, voice generation, visuals, and music composition. The workflow integrates HyperFrames for video generation, Archon as an orchestration harness, and Neon for backend infrastructure, producing polished videos from a single command.
